issues.message: Wrong import_path: data says '@gravity-ui/timeline' but package.json exports this component from '@gravity-ui/timeline/react' (via ./react entry point). import_path and import_statement should use '@gravity-ui/timeline/react'.

Wrong import_path: data says '@gravity-ui/timeline' but this hook is exported from '@gravity-ui/timeline/react' (via ./react entry point). import_path and import_statement should use '@gravity-ui/timeline/react'.

Wrong import_path: data says '@gravity-ui/timeline' but this hook is exported from '@gravity-ui/timeline/react' (via ./react entry point). import_path and import_statement should use '@gravity-ui/timeline/react'.
Description says 'The canvas fills its parent container at 100% width and height' but omits that the canvas also sets position: relative and tabIndex={0} for keyboard focus support.

Description says 'start/stop helpers for manual canvas management' — these are thin wrappers around timeline.init(canvas) and timeline.destroy(). The term 'manual canvas management' is slightly vague but not materially wrong.
